message:
fix: Restore corrupted source files from known good state

Emergency fix for truncated/corrupted source files that caused
compilation failures in v0.1.62:

- src/lib.rs: Restored from dde393d (was truncated at line 10755)
- src/pages/wizard.rs: Restored from known working state
- src/ui/tui.rs: Restored from known working state
- src/connectors/gemini.rs: Restored from known working state

The corruption appears to have occurred during the bulk commit
process. All files now compile successfully.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
